title: Clippy: 11 map(...).unwrap_or_else(...) on Option — replace with map_or_else
description:
Current state: 

Desired state: 

Reason: 

**Dimension:** Cognitive Readability, DRY
**Lint:** clippy::map_unwrap_or
**Count:** 11 on Option, 3 on Result, 3 on Option with unwrap_or(default)

## Violation
Chaining `.map(f).unwrap_or_else(g)` forces the reader to mentally merge two transformations. `Option::map_or_else` (and `Result::map_or_else`) expresses the same logic in one call with clearer parameter semantics (default-producing closure first).

## Locations
Option .map().unwrap_or_else():
- src/pipeline.rs: 379, 789, 794, 799, 804, 816, 821, 826, 831
- src/tui/app.rs: 1386
- src/vdd/mod.rs: 923

Result .map().unwrap_or_else():
- src/auto_learn.rs: 511
- src/tui/app.rs: 1711
- src/tui/mod.rs: 812

Option .map().unwrap_or(value):
- src/pipeline.rs: 260 (twice), 265

Option .map().unwrap_or(false):
- src/pipeline.rs: 270

## Mandated Refactor
```rust
// Before
some_opt.map(|x| transform(x)).unwrap_or_else(|| default())
// After
some_opt.map_or_else(|| default(), |x| transform(x))
// For map().unwrap_or(v):
some_opt.map_or(v, |x| transform(x))
```
pipeline.rs has 9 of 11 occurrences concentrated in a small range — likely a copy-paste cluster worth examining for DRY extraction into a helper.
